nav-back: color: var(--tg-blue); display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; gap: 2px;
nav-avatar: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFC163, #FA790F); color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; flex-shrink: 0;
bubble: max-width: 78%; padding: 7px 11px 6px; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.3; position: relative; word-wrap: break-word;
duck-body: position: absolute; inset: 14% 10% 6% 10%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 45% 40%, #FFE89B, #FFD147 55%, #EDA421); border-radius: 50%;
duck-head: position: absolute; width: 50px; height: 50px; top: 0; right: 4px; background: radial-gradient(circle at 45% 40%, #FFE89B, #FFCF3E 55%, #E9A115); border-radius: 50%;
duck-eye: position: absolute; width: 9px; height: 9px; top: 16px; right: 12px; background: #111; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: inset -2px -2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
duck-beak: position: absolute; width: 18px; height: 10px; top: 26px; right: -4px; background: #F47C2C; border-radius: 50% 50% 35% 35%; transform: rotate(8deg);
duck-wing: position: absolute; width: 30px; height: 24px; bottom: 20%; left: 24%; background: #E49411; border-radius: 50% 50% 60% 40%;
sticker-meta: text-align: right; font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 2px 4px 0;
voice-play: width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
wave: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; height: 20px; flex: 1;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: #8D8E93; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; flex: 1;
